untranslatable_reason: The signal requires detection of a descending broadening wedge pattern (a multi-bar price formation with expanding upper and lower boundaries). This complex geometric pattern detection is not expressible using the available point-in-time indicators (moving averages, RSI, ATR, etc.). Pattern recognition of this type requires either custom pattern detection logic or higher-order shape analysis beyond the allowed indicator vocabulary. The breakaway gap component also requires pattern-specific logic.
translation_notes: Attempted to approximate using Donchian channel breakout as a proxy for wedge breakout, and 5% failure rate as exit condition from source text. However, the core pattern definition (wedge geometry with widening range as price descends) cannot be accurately captured with available indicators. Requires dedicated pattern detection engine or custom functions.
